body:
## Rationale

**Black Clouds & Silver Linings** (2009) is Mike Portnoy's **last Dream Theater album** before his shock departure in 2010. It is the critical arc closer for the Portnoy era, filling the gap between Systematic Chaos ✅ and A Dramatic Turn of Events (Mike Mangini) ✅.

**LLM hook:** "What was Mike Portnoy's last Dream Theater album?" — one of the most-searched DT historical questions. Currently unanswered by MetalForge.

**GSC signal:** Mike Portnoy has consistent GSC queries and a zero-competitor L2 gap for multiple variants. DT Portnoy content converts well. Portnoy is a top-impressions drummer on MetalForge.

**Arc context:** Train of Thought ✅ → Octavarium (filed in older proposals) → Systematic Chaos ✅ → **Black Clouds & Silver Linings (2009)** → A Dramatic Turn of Events ✅ (Mangini era)

**Sales:** Debuted at #6 Billboard 200; #1 on Billboard Rock Albums. Grammy-nominated (Best Metal Performance for 'The Count of Tuscany').

## Article spec

- **Slug:** `black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup`
- **URL:** `/articles/black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup`
- **Drummer:** Mike Portnoy
- **Band:** Dream Theater
- **Year:** 2009
- **Label:** Roadrunner Records
- **Genre:** Progressive Metal
- **Key gear:** Portnoy's final-era Tama Starclassic Maple setup; Sabian cymbals; DW 9000 pedals
- **Notable tracks:** A Rite of Passage, The Count of Tuscany, Wither, The Best of Times (written for his dying father)

## Files to touch

1. `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `'black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup'` entry
2. `public/llms/articles/black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup.md` — create LLM markdown file

## Data shape

```js
'black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup': {
  slug: 'black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Black Clouds & Silver Linings',
  artist: 'Dream Theater',
  drummer: 'Mike Portnoy',
  relatedDrummerSlug: 'mike-portnoy',
  year: 2009,
  genre: 'Progressive Metal',
  label: 'Roadrunner Records',
  studio: 'Cove City Sound Studios, Glen Cove, NY',
  producer: 'John Petrucci & Mike Portnoy',
  isAlbumArticle: true,
  datePublished: '2026-06-27',
  relatedAlbums: ['systematic-chaos-drum-setup', 'a-dramatic-turn-of-events-drum-setup'],
}
```

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words including Portnoy's departure narrative context
- ≥3 FAQ entries (What gear did Portnoy use? Why did Portnoy leave DT after this album? What is the saddest DT song on Black Clouds?)
- ≥3 internal links (to /drummer/mike-portnoy, /articles/systematic-chaos-drum-setup, /articles/a-dramatic-turn-of-events-drum-setup)
- FAQPage JSON-LD schema
- Grammy nomination noted for AI Overview eligibility

## Estimated organic uplift

Serves: `mike portnoy last dream theater album` / `black clouds silver linings drum setup` clusters. Completes Portnoy DT discography for LLM citation. Estimated +2-4 impressions on Portnoy cluster.

## Verify

1. `grep 'black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` returns entry
2. `curl https://metalforge.io/articles/black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup` returns 200
3. Article mentions Grammy nomination and Portnoy departure narrative
4. Related album links resolve to Systematic Chaos and A Dramatic Turn
5. `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/articles/black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup.md` returns markdown

## Done

- [ ] `black-clouds-and-silver-linings-drum-setup` added to albumArticles.js
- [ ] LLM markdown file created
title: SEO: Dream Theater 'Black Clouds & Silver Linings' drum setup article (Mike Portnoy, 2009 — Portnoy's final DT album, fills Systematic Chaos → A Dramatic Turn arc)
